scenes.text:
Nothing grows in the
comfort zone. Absolutely nothing.

Your comfort zone feels safe but it is slowly killing your potential. Every day you stay comfortable, your world gets a little smaller. Your ambitions shrink.
Your tolerance for risk drops. And one day you wake up and realize you have been alive for years but you stopped living long ago.

Do one thing every day that scares you. Not reckless things. Growth things. Have the hard conversation.
Apply for the job. Launch the business. Ask for the raise. Discomfort is the currency of growth.

Life begins at the edge of your
comfort zone. Step over that line today.

What is one thing outside your comfort zone
you will do today? Follow for daily courage.
